title: Week 1: Shock and Awe
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
With a deluge of executive orders and actions in his first few days, Mr Trump already changed the world. It will take time to figure out just how. Rival power centres have thus far been silent, but we must not mistake initial numbness for acceptance.
